basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Central Bank of India has released the official Counselor Recruitment 2026 notification on 06 May 2026 at https://www.centralbankofindia.co.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under this recruitment for FLC Anuppur, FLC Dindori, and FLC Shahdol. Eligible candidates aged between 45 and 65 years who are graduates in any discipline and computer literate with knowledge of MS Office, internet, and local language typing can apply through offline mode. The last date to submit the application form is 22 May 2026. Candidates must send the duly filled application form along with self-atte

age_limit.age_details: Above 45 years and should be less than 65 years
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 65 years No age relaxation is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Must be computer literate, proficient in basic knowledge of MS Office, internet, and typing in local language.
qualification.details: Counselor FLC: Must be Graduate in any discipline from recognized university. Shall be computer literate, shall have proficient in basis knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language. Retired/VRS opted Bank officials of scale I & above of Nationalized Bank including State Bank of India & RRBs preferred OR Ex-Serviceman or/and other than Bank Employees (Eg Government School Teacher etc) having Banking Knowledge and Knowledge of financial services & having completed relevant IIBF certification course. He should have unblemished service record and possess service certificate from the previous employer. Experience as an Officer/permanent employee of 10 years.

salary_details.pay_scale: Equivalent to last pay & allowances drawn less the initial amount of Pension fixed before commutation plus relief etc. payable thereon or Rs. 25,000/-p.m. whichever is lower. Further a lump sum amount of Rs. 1000/- p.m. shall be paid towards Mobile, Conveyance etc.
salary_details.details: Equivalent to last pay & allowances drawn less the initial amount of Pension fixed before commutation plus relief etc. payable thereon or Rs. 25,000/-p.m. whichever is lower. Further a lump sum amount of Rs. 1000/- p.m. shall be paid towards Mobile, Conveyance etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Bank of India Counselor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Counselor posts at Central Bank of India is 22 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any discipline from a recognized university and be computer literate. Retired bank officials or ex-servicemen with banking knowledge are preferred. A minimum of 10 years of experience as an officer or permanent employee is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Counselor position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Counselor post is above 45 years and less than 65 years. There is no mention of age relaxation in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Counselor post, with one vacancy each for Counselor FLC Anuppur, Counselor FLC Dindori, and Counselor FLC Shahdol.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The salary is equivalent to the last pay and allowances drawn less the initial pension amount or Rs. 25,000/- p.m. (whichever is lower), plus Rs. 1000/- p.m. for mobile/conveyance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counselor post will be based on a personal interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is prescribed for any category for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach required documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Counselor post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where are the Counselor posts located?
faq.answer: The Counselor posts are located in Madhya Pradesh, specifically at the FLC centers in Anuppur, Dindori, and Shahdol.
